titleStmt.title: SII 9.188: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 188. (A.R. No. 279 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT GUDIHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Pushya, śu. 11, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1112 December 30 Monday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that, when the Mahāsāmantādhipati Anantapāḷayya was in charge of the vaḍḍa-rāvuḷa of the seven-and-a half lakh country, Aḷiya Mādirājarasa of that of Banavāsi twelve-thousand Halasige twelve-thousand and Noḷambavādi thirtytwo-thousand and Pālimarasa was in charge of the vaḍḍa-rāvuḷa of Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, a grant of the tollrevenue was made under the orders of Anantapāḷayya, for the service of the god Noḷambēśvaradēva in Arasiyakeṟe in Muttage thirty by Chāvuṇḍamayya-Nāyaka. The gift was made after washing the feet of Varēśvara-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . duritēbhēṁdrakaṭhōrakuṁbhadaḷa
naṁ śrīghanavaktrōgrasatkarasākhāṁkuradharmmanirmmaḷaguṇaṁ paṁcēṁdriya
prauḍhataskarasāmūhabhayaṁkaraṁ prabaḷasaucācāra
baḷaṁ varēsvaradēvaṁ prabhunāmadhēyanesedaṁ viśvaṁbharācakrado
ḷ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsa
bda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpraca(ṁ)ṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ Anantapāḷayyaṁga
ḷ saptārddhalakkheya vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdā
ḷuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanu
mahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyaka Aḷiya mādirājarasaru banavāse
pannircchāsirada halasige pannircchāsirada noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsirada va
ḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷuttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi śrīmaddaṁḍanāyaka pālimarasaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchā
sirada vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkamaṁ sukhadiṁdāḷuttamiralu Āyayyana besadiṁ śrī
mat cāvuṇḍamayyanāyakaru kadaṁbaḷike sāyira kōgaḷi Ainūṟaṟa va
ḍḍarāvuḷada sunkamanāḷuttamiralu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 37 neya
nandanasaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha 11 sōmavāradaṁdu Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vya
tīpātamuṁ kūḍidandu kōgaḷi Ainūṟaṟa kaṁpaṇa muttage mūvattaṟa baḷi
ya bāḍaṁ śrīmadarasiyakeṟeya noḷaṁbēsvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ snānani
vēdyakkaṁ noḷaṁbēsvaradēvara Eraḍuṁ kauvuṁgina tōṭada Aḍakeyaṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷada
suṁkamaṁ śrīmatuvarēsvarapaṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa
rī dharmmamanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷsidaṁ kurukṣētraṁ prayāge vāraṇāsi Argghyatī
rtthagaḷalu sāyira kapileya kōḍuṁ koḷagmaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭisi sāyira vē
dapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidavarā tī
rtthadalu vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ kapileyamumanaḷida mahā
pātakamakku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī
yō bhavadbhiḥ . Ētāni ṣaḍbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadra . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi [ḥ.*]
Digital edition of SII 9.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
